name: millerwoodtradepub.com
message: Established in 1927, Miller Wood Trade Publications is a leading source of information for the forest products industry, publishing 10 specialized magazines and resources. Their offerings include various marketing directories and handbooks tailored to the lumber market. The company's publications serve both domestic and international clients, connecting suppliers with buyers across the globe. With a focus on the lumber trade, they cater to all segments of this billion-dollar industry
